name.description: Optional name for the job. Default is Untitled.

tags.description: Map of tags associated with the job

tasks.description: List of task specifications for the job. A job must contain at least one task.

job_clusters.description: A list of job cluster specifications that can be shared and reused by tasks.

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds applied to each run of this job. Default is no timeout.

max_concurrent_runs.description: Maximum allowed number of concurrent runs of the job. Default is 1.

trigger.description: Trigger settings for file arrival events

format.description: Format of the job. MULTI_TASK is the preferred format for creating jobs with multiple tasks.

run_as.description: User or service principal to run the job as
